description: Tracks newsletter emails processed by the /wiki newsletter-ingest pipeline. The weekly loop reads emails from the listed senders newer than last_processed_date, ingests on-domain academic papers, then advances last_processed_date and appends thread IDs here. Gmail MCP is READ-ONLY (no label writes), so state lives in this file, not in Gmail labels.
notes: alphaXiv digests expose arXiv IDs directly (reliable).
nlpnews 'Top AI Papers' mask IDs behind substack redirects — resolve+verify before ingest.
nlpnews 'AI Agents Weekly' are paywalled previews — papers section not in email body; low yield.
Every candidate arXiv ID is verified against arxiv.org/abs/{id} before download.

runs.notes: Initial 3-month backfill. All 109 candidate arXiv IDs verified real (none fabricated). Ingested in 2 waves x 6 parallel agents (batches 1-12).
Manual on-demand run scoped to nlpnews. 'Top AI Papers' digest (10 papers, Substack-masked IDs resolved + verified, all new). 'AI Agents Weekly' was product news, no arXiv papers.

alphaXiv 2026-06-17 digest. 4 clean arXiv IDs + GLM-5.2 (alphaXiv-native 2026.glm-5-2, no report). last_processed_date intentionally left at 2026-06-08 so the unprocessed Jun-10 alphaXiv digest (19eb357a10111d1d) is not skipped.

runs.type: weekly (manual, alphaXiv Jun-10 catch-up) + concept promotions
runs.notes: Ingested the pending Jun-10 alphaXiv digest. 4 arXiv + MAI-Thinking-1 (alphaXiv-native). Promoted 3 over-threshold dangling concepts. last_processed_date advanced to 2026-06-18 (both Jun-10 + Jun-17 done); pending_threads cleared.
NLP 'Top AI Papers' Jun 14-21 digest. All 10 Substack-masked IDs resolved + verified, all new. Advanced cursor to 2026-06-21; 4 older NLP threads (1 paper digest + 3 product/article) left pending.
Swept 3 unprocessed paper digests (alphaXiv Jun-24, NLP Jun21-28, NLP Jun7-14). 4 dups + GLM-5.2 skipped. Pushed prior 8 commits before this run. Cursor -> 2026-06-28; 3 product-news threads pending.

pending_threads.reason: AI Agents Weekly (GPT-5.6, Ornith-1.0, Codex Inside OpenAI…) — product news.
AI Agents Weekly (GLM-5.2, Claude Code Artifacts…) — product news.
'Autonomous Long-Running Coding Agents' deep-dive article — may cite papers.
